title: Droid bio-assault spray
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bio-assault spray''' was an illegal weapon in many [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] and employed by [[Battle droid/Legends|combat droids]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. These sprays would fire a chemical that broke down a target on a molecular level, leaving nothing but a gray slime behind.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
